title: Rainbow XP Bar
description: A clean, vanilla-friendly resource pack that transforms the XP bar into a smooth, vibrant rainbow gradient.
body:
# Rainbow XP Bar

Give your Minecraft HUD a vibrant upgrade with the Rainbow XP Bar resource pack. This pack replaces the standard experience bar with a smooth, multi-color gradient that flows across the screen, making leveling up feel more dynamic and visually satisfying.

## Features

- 🌈 Fully retextured XP bar with a rainbow gradient
- 🎯 Clean, vanilla-friendly design — no unnecessary clutter
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
- 🧩 Compatible with most resource packs (UI-focused change only)
  
## Design Approach

The pack keeps Minecraft’s original layout intact while enhancing the visual feedback of experience gain. The gradient transitions smoothly across the bar, ensuring it looks consistent at all XP levels without harsh color breaks.
